title: About
text:
I am aВ motivated and dependable individual with strong communication and creative skills, currently pursuing higher education. A proven ability to manage projects and adapt to new challenges. Seeking opportunities to contribute to a dynamic team while continuing to grow both personally and professionally.

Throughout my time at the University of Nebraska-Lincoln, I have acquired various skills, including proficiency in Adobe Photoshop and Lightroom, as well as experience with social media platforms such as Instagram, TikTok, and Facebook. Additionally, I have developed a solid understanding of design principles, including color theory, typography, and layout. I managed various social media accounts throughout high school and college, developing many of the skills I have acquired.
I have done graphic design work for Nebraska, as well photography.

title: Why Caleb Williams is Scarier than you think.
text:
Caleb Williams, the 23-year-old Chicago Bears Quarterback, is WAY scarier than you think.


Code
library(tidyverse)


в”Ђв”Ђ Attaching core tidyverse packages в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђ tidyverse 2.0.0 в”Ђв”Ђ
вњ” dplyr     1.2.0     вњ” readr     2.1.6
вњ” forcats   1.0.1     вњ” stringr   1.6.0
вњ” ggplot2   4.0.2     вњ” tibble    3.3.1
вњ” lubridate 1.9.4     вњ” tidyr     1.3.2
вњ” purrr     1.2.1     
в”Ђв”Ђ Conflicts в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђ tidyverse_conflicts() в”Ђв”Ђ
вњ– dplyr::filter() masks stats::filter()
вњ– dplyr::lag()    masks stats::lag()
в„№ Use the conflicted package (<http://conflicted.r-lib.org/>) to force all conflicts to become errors


Code
library(nflreadr)




Code
bearsqb <- read_csv("data/bearsqbs.csv")


New names:
Rows: 185 Columns: 31
в”Ђв”Ђ Column specification
в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђ Delimiter: "," chr
(4): Player, Pos, QBrec, Player-additional dbl (26): Rk, From, To, G, AV, Cmp,
Att, Cmp%, Yds...12, TD, TD%, Int, Int%,... lgl (1): QBR
в„№ Use `spec()` to retrieve the full column specification for this data. в„№
Specify the column types or set `show_col_types = FALSE` to quiet this message.
вЂў `Yds` -> `Yds...12`
вЂў `Yds` -> `Yds...25`


Code
bearsqb_30 <- bearsqb |>
  group_by(Player) |>
  summarise(
    games = G,
    ypg = mean(`Y/G`, na.rm = TRUE)
  ) |>
  filter(games >= 30,
  ypg >= 80
         )

caleb <- bearsqb_30 |>
  filter(Player == "Caleb Williams")


ggplot() +
  geom_bar(
    data = bearsqb_30,
    aes(
      x = reorder(Player, ypg),
      weight = ypg
    )
  ) + 
  geom_bar(
    data = caleb,
    aes(
      x = reorder(Player, ypg),
      weight = ypg
    ),
    fill = "#C83803"
  ) +
  coord_flip() +
  labs(
    title = "All Time Bears Pass Yards/Per Game",
    subtitle = "Caleb Williams is already second??",
    x = "Quarterback",
    y = "Pass Yards/Per Game",
    caption = "Data: Pro Football Reference | By: Gavin Fee"
  ) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    title = element_text(color = "navy", size = 15, face = "bold"),
    plot.background = element_rect(fill = "000000"),
    panel.border = element_rect(linetype = "dashed", fill = NA),
    panel.grid.major = element_line(colour = "orange"),
    axis.text = element_text(color = "navy")
  )









Now, why would I show you this? Why is it cool to brag about being second on the all-time list, especially it being a list of bears quarterbacks, who are historically bad.

As mediocre as Jay Cutler was, did you know that the NFLвЂ™s passing numbers have gone down significantly since his time as the BearsвЂ™ Quarterback?



Code
passing_data <- load_player_stats(seasons = 2014:2025) %>%
  filter(position == "QB") %>%
  group_by(season) %>%
  summarise(avg_pass_yards = mean(passing_yards, na.rm = TRUE))

ggplot() +
  geom_line(
    data = passing_data,
    aes(
      x = season,
      y = avg_pass_yards
      ),
    color = "#013369", 
    size = 1.2) + 
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(
    title = "The Evolution of the Air Attack",
    subtitle = "Average Passing Yards/Per Game per Quarterback (2014-2025)",
    x = "Season",
    y = "Avg Passing Yards/Per Game",
    caption = "Data: nflreadr"
  ) +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 16))


Warning: Using `size` aesthetic for lines was deprecated in ggplot2 3.4.0.
в„№ Please use `linewidth` instead.
